description: One learning a trade or craft under skilled guidance; a practitioner in training. 'Moloi' names the becoming craftsperson—hands learning what masters know.
sound_symbolism: The word moves with learning. 'Mo' shapes with practicing motion, skill forming. 'Lo' opens with guided path, knowledge flowing. Then 'i' rises to growing competence.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo moloi' (the apprentice). More specific than 'thunai' (student)—learns craft through doing. Member of 'temu' (guild).

pillars.solarpunk-values: Skill transfer—ensuring craft knowledge passes to new generations.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Apprenticeship as transmission—learning by doing alongside a master.
